title: sorghum acutiusculum
intro: Sorghum acutiusculum, also known as Chinese broom grass, is a type of perennial grass native to China and other parts of Asia. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antibacterial effects. The health benefits of sorghum acutiusculum include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate digestive issues, and treat respiratory problems. Sorghum acutiusculum can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and decoctions, which are commonly used in Chinese medicine to promote overall well-being and treat various health conditions.
